name: Iter19 — Confetti and excellence banner appear for score >= 90
description: When a PR receives a quality score of 90 or higher, colorful confetti animation and a gold Excellence banner appear on the review report. Use a simple documentation-only PR that is likely to score very high.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/github/gitignore/pull/1 into the PR input field
Click the Analyze PR button and wait for the review to complete
Verify the review report is visible with a numeric score

If the score shown is 90 or higher, verify confetti colored elements appear on the page and a gold Excellence banner with celebratory text is visible — if score is below 90, this step passes vacuously
